zh: 孩子會從媽媽日漸隆起的肚子、
en: The child will notice mom's growing belly,

zh: 或言談中知道將要有位弟弟或妹妹要誕生了、
en: or learn through conversation that a sibling is coming.

zh: 何不讓他心裏有準備、而不要亂猜想、
en: Why not prepare them mentally, so they don't guess wildly?

zh: 這時爸爸媽媽可以用很溫和的態度、
en: Parents can, in a gentle manner,

zh: 或是讓他摸摸媽媽隆起的肚子、
en: or let them touch mom's rounded belly.

zh: 告訴他、弟弟或妹妹生下來時、
en: Tell them that when the little sibling is born,
they'll be just as tiny as you were,
they won't be able to walk,
and won't be able to play with you right away.
